channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-19351] sanity test_205l: Verify job stats can scale hung
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for jianyu <yujian@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/cf3c5a03-4106-4e2d-ae52-6ec544341997

test_205l failed with the following error:

== sanity test 205l: Verify job stats can scale ========== 05:22:12 (1757481732)
CMD: onyx-152vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param jobid_var=procname_uid jobid_name=%e.%u
jobid_var=procname_uid
jobid_name=%e.root
CMD: onyx-152vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.job_cleanup_interval=5
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.job_cleanup_interval=5
mdt.lustre-MDT0002.job_cleanup_interval=5
CMD: onyx-152vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.job_stats=clear
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.job_stats=clear
mdt.lustre-MDT0002.job_stats=clear
CMD: onyx-152vm11 /usr/sbin/lctl set_param mdt.*.job_cleanup_interval=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0000.job_cleanup_interval=0
mdt.lustre-MDT0002.job_cleanup_interval=0

Test session details:
clients: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-503.40.1.el9_5.x86_64
servers: https://build.whamcloud.com/job/lustre-master/4652 - 5.14.0-503.40.1_lustre.el9.x86_64

<<Please provide additional information about the failure here>>

VVVVVVV DO NOT REMOVE LINES BELOW, Added by Maloo for auto-association VVVVVVV
sanity test_205l - Timeout occurred after 356 minutes, last suite running was sanity
item.summary: sanity test_205l: Verify job stats can scale hung

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment:
"Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>" merged in patch https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61368/
Subject: LU-19351 tests: decrease $limit in sanity.sh/205l
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set:
Commit: ac764254c892c881c1f330d03336871a5df2f6c7

"Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>" uploaded a new patch: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/61368
Subject: LU-19351 tests: decrease $limit in sanity.sh/205l
Project: fs/lustre-release
Branch: master
Current Patch Set: 1
Commit: bc5501004bdc0c0cb98734fcdb90906ac67e483e

yujian , thank you very much!

I will decrease "limit" when SLOW=yes to fix this issue.

Yes, emoly.liu.
From lustre-initialization-1.autotest.onyx-152vm8.log in https://testing.whamcloud.com/test_sets/1de6a3a2-5442-4406-a129-aa03434a63a1, we can see:

export SLOW=yes

yujian ,

I ask if "SLOW=yes" in these failed tests, because "limit=500000" will take about

(30 - 3 * (sleep 5)) * 500000 / 500 = 15000(s)

to complete, which is much more than Autotest timeout 90mins.

I noticed these cases are not patch review running, so could you please have a check at "SLOW" setting?

Thanks.

There is a condition in sanity.sh/test_205l:

local limit=500
[[ $SLOW == "no" ]] || limit=500000

So, we set SLOW=yes in group "full-dne-part-2"?

This issue has been seen on master in full-dne-part-2 group quite frequently since 2024-12-16, for over 1.5 years, also since it was landed by LU-18351 at https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/56607 .

The MDT0 logs showed multiple locks on [0x200000007:0x1:0x0] were not properly released. The resource ref count increased continuously to 278, hit the DDOS protection limit.

00010000:00000010:1.1:1757487176.363282:0:667866:0:(ldlm_lock.c:176:lock_handle_free()) slab-freed 'lock': 496 at ffff88aa97881800.
00010000:00000040:1.0:1757487176.375684:0:509389:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1657:ldlm_resource_dump()) ### ### ns: mdt-lustre-MDT0000_UUID lock: ffff88ab4ecee200/0x96e30efbb9da985c lrc: 2/0,1 mode: TXN/TXN res: [0x200000007:0x1:0x0].0xf9e02ed8 bits 0x2/0x0 rrc: 253 type: IBT flags: 0x40210000000000 pid: 523302 initiator: MDT0
...
00010000:00000040:0.0:1757487177.378286:0:523302:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1657:ldlm_resource_dump()) ### ### ns: mdt-lustre-MDT0000_UUID lock: ffff88aa975b6e00/0x96e30efbb9da9418 lrc: 2/0,1 mode: TXN/TXN res: [0x200000007:0x1:0x0].0xf9e02ed8 bits 0x2/0x0 rrc: 278 type: IBT flags: 0x40210000000000 pid: 523302 initiator: MDT0
00010000:00000040:0.0:1757487177.378287:0:523302:0:(ldlm_resource.c:1660:ldlm_resource_dump()) only dump 257 granted locks to avoid DDOS.
...
00010000:00010000:0.0:1757487177.378294:0:523302:0:(ldlm_inodebits.c:73:ldlm_reprocess_inodebits_queue()) --- Reprocess resource [0x200000007:0x1:0x0].0xf9e02ed8 (ffff88aa626aad80)
...
00000020:00000040:0.0:1757487177.378303:0:523302:0:(lustre_handles.c:129:class_handle2object()) GET ldlm ffff88aa9782a800 refcount=3
...
00010000:00010000:0.0:1757487177.378316:0:523302:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1907:ldlm_handle_bl_callback()) ### client blocking AST callback handler ns: mdt-lustre-MDT0000_UUID lock: ffff88aa9782a800/0x96e30efbb9daef65 lrc: 3/0,0 mode: CW/CW res: [0x200000007:0x1:0x0].0x0 bits 0x2/0x0 rrc: 4 type: IBT flags: 0x40210400000000 pid: 523302 initiator: MDT0
00010000:00010000:0.0:1757487177.378318:0:523302:0:(ldlm_lockd.c:1919:ldlm_handle_bl_callback()) Lock ffff88aa9782a800 already unused, calling callback (ffffffffc1c91f50)

The failure occurred on all of the supported distros on master branch.
It's blocking the subsequent sanity subtests from running.
